lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਦਰੁ ਚਤੁਰੁ ਤਤ ਕਾ ਬੇਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sundar chatur tat kaa betaa |
lines.english: beauty, intelligence, and the realization of reality;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਕੈ ਮਧਿ ਸਗਲ ਤੇ ਉਦਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kai madh sagal te udaas |
lines.english: in the midst of all, and yet detached from all;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੁ ਸ੍ਰੇਸਟ ਊਤਮ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: giaan sresatt aootam isanaan |
lines.english: The most sublime wisdom and purifying baths;

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰਿ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਕਮਲ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: chaar padaarath kamal pragaas |
lines.english: the four cardinal blessings, the opening of the heart-lotus;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਬਚਨ ਮਨਿ ਸੁਨੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: gur naanak naam bachan man sune |6|
lines.english: through Guru Nanak, chants the Naam with his mouth, and hears the Word with his ears. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਫਲ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕੈ ਮੁਖਿ ਭਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: eih fal tis jan kai mukh bhane |
lines.english: - these blessings come to one who,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਮਦਰਸੀ ਏਕ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੇਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: samadarasee ek drisattetaa |
lines.english: to look impartially upon all, and to see only the One

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਨਾਮ ਧੁਨਿ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: gun gobind naam dhun baanee |
lines.english: In it is the Glory of God, the Naam, the chanting of Gurbani.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਜਪੈ ਮਨਿ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu nidhaan japai man koe |
lines.english: One who chants this treasure in his mind

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jug meh taa kee gat hoe |
lines.english: in every age, he attains salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਮਤਾਂਤ ਕੇਵਲ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: sagal mataant keval har naam |
lines.english: The essence of all religion is the Lord's Name alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਭਗਤ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: gobind bhagat kai man bisraam |
lines.english: It abides in the minds of the devotees of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਬੇਦ ਬਖਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: simrit saasatr bed bakhaanee |
lines.english: The Simritees, the Shaastras and the Vedas speak of it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਅਪ੍ਰਾਧ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਟੈ ॥
lines.translit: kott apraadh saadhasang mittai |
lines.english: Millions of sins are erased, in the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਕਰਮ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai masatak karam prabh paae |
lines.english: Those, who have such pre-ordained destiny on their foreheads,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਤੇ ਜਮ ਤੇ ਛੁਟੈ ॥
lines.translit: sant kripaa te jam te chhuttai |
lines.english: By the Grace of the Saint, one escapes the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਆਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਚੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: tis jan aavai har prabh cheet |
lines.english: that humble person consciously remembers the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਸਰਣਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਆਏ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: saadh saran naanak te aae |7|
lines.english: O Nanak, enter the Sanctuary of the Saints. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਬਸੈ ਸੁਨੈ ਲਾਇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis man basai sunai laae preet |
lines.english: One, within whose mind it abides, and who listens to it with love

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਲਭ ਦੇਹ ਤਤਕਾਲ ਉਧਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: dulabh deh tatakaal udhaarai |
lines.english: The human body, so difficult to obtain, is instantly redeemed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸੋਭਾ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਬਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: niramal sobhaa amrit taa kee baanee |
lines.english: Spotlessly pure is his reputation, and ambrosial is his speech.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: ek naam man maeh samaanee |
lines.english: The One Name permeates his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਦੂਖੁ ਨਿਵਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran taa kaa dookh nivaarai |
lines.english: The pains of birth and death are removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਤਾ ਕੇ ਕਰਮ ॥
lines.translit: saadh naam niramal taa ke karam |
lines.english: He is called a Holy person; his actions are immaculate and pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੇ ਊਚ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਬਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: sabh te aooch taa kee sobhaa banee |
lines.english: His glory becomes the highest of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖ ਰੋਗ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਭੈ ਭਰਮ ॥
lines.translit: dookh rog binase bhai bharam |
lines.english: Sorrow, sickness, fear and doubt depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਇਹ ਗੁਣਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਖਮਨੀ ॥੮॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: naanak ih gun naam sukhamanee |8|24|
lines.english: O Nanak, by these Glorious Virtues, this is named Sukhmani, Peace of mind. ||8||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਿਤੀ ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: thitee gaurree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: T'hitee ~ The Lunar Days: Gauree, Fifth Mehl,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਭਾਂਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਪਸਰਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਏਕੰਕਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anik bhaant hoe pasariaa naanak ekankaar |1|
lines.english: In so many ways, the One, the Universal Creator has diffused Himself, O Nanak. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਪੂਰਿਆ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸਿਰਜਨਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jal thal maheeal pooriaa suaamee sirajanahaar |
lines.english: The Creator Lord and Master is pervading the water, the land, and the sky.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਮ ਏਕੰਕਾਰੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਕਰਉ ਬੰਦਨਾ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: ekam ekankaar prabh krau bandanaa dhiaae |
lines.english: The first day of the lunar cycle: Bow in humility and meditate on the One, the Universal Creator Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੁਪਾਲ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਨਿ ਪਰਉ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gun gobind gupaal prabh saran prau har raae |
lines.english: Praise God, the Lord of the Universe, the Sustainer of the World; seek the Sanctuary of the Lord, our King.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਆਸ ਕਲਿਆਣ ਸੁਖ ਜਾ ਤੇ ਸਭੁ ਕਛੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: taa kee aas kaliaan sukh jaa te sabh kachh hoe |
lines.english: Place your hopes in Him, for salvation and peace; all things come from Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰਿ ਕੁੰਟ ਦਹ ਦਿਸਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿਓ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: chaar kuntt deh dis bhramio tis bin avar na koe |
lines.english: I wandered around the four corners of the world and in the ten directions, but I saw nothing except Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਾਰਨ ਭੈ ਹਰਨ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: patit udhaaran bhai haran sukh saagar nirankaar |
lines.english: The Saving Grace of sinners, the Destroyer of fear, the Ocean of peace, the Formless Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਨ ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਸੁਨੇ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਕਰਉ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bed puraan simrit sune bahu bidh krau beechaar |
lines.english: I listened to the Vedas, the Puraanas and the Simritees, and I pondered over them in so many ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਚਾਹਹਿ ਸੋਈ ਮਿਲੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo chaaheh soee milai naanak har gun gaae |1|
lines.english: You shall obtain all that you desire, O Nanak, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਤਾ ਭੁਗਤਾ ਦੇਨਹਾਰੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: daataa bhugataa denahaar tis bin avar na jaae |
lines.english: The Great Giver, the Enjoyer, the Bestower - there is no place at all without Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਭਜੀਐ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਮੇਰੇ ਮੀਤ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mil bhajeeai saadhasang mere meet |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Join the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and vibrate, meditate on Him, O my friend. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਨੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: gobind jas gaaeeai har neet |
lines.english: Sing the Praises of the Lord, the Lord of the Universe, each and every day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਉ ਬੰਦਨਾ ਅਨਿਕ ਵਾਰ ਸਰਨਿ ਪਰਉ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: krau bandanaa anik vaar saran prau har raae |
lines.english: Bow in humility to the Lord, over and over again, and enter the Sanctuary of the Lord, our King.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਕਟੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਦੁਤੀਆ ਭਾਉ ਮਿਟਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhram katteeai naanak saadhasang duteea bhaau mittaae |2|
lines.english: Doubt is eradicated, O Nanak, in the Company of the Holy, and the love of duality is eliminated. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਤੀਆ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਿ ਨੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: duteea duramat door kar gur sevaa kar neet |
lines.english: The second day of the lunar cycle: Get rid of your evil-mindedness, and serve the Guru continually.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਰਤਨੁ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਬਸੈ ਤਜਿ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਮੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: raam ratan man tan basai taj kaam krodh lobh meet |
lines.english: The jewel of the Lord's Name shall come to dwell in your mind and body, when you renounce sexual desire, anger and greed, O my friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਤਜਹੁ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਭਜਹੁ ਭਾਉ ਭਗਤਿ ਪਰਵੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: aap tajahu gobind bhajahu bhaau bhagat paraves |
lines.english: Renounce your self-conceit and vibrate upon the Lord of the Universe; loving devotion to Him shall permeate your being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਣੁ ਮਿਟੈ ਜੀਵਨੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਬਿਨਸਹਿ ਸਗਲ ਕਲੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: maran mittai jeevan milai binaseh sagal kales |
lines.english: Conquer death and obtain eternal life; all your troubles will depart.
